description: A live broadcast still labeled 'House Chamber' showing a woman with short light hair and glasses in a blue jacket seated beside a man in a dark suit, both with neutral expressions. A chyron reads 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Delivers State of the Union Address' with a 'REAL AMERICA'S VOICE' logo and a 'THE REAL STATE OF THE UNION' graphic.
notable_text: House Chamber; PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Delivers State of the Union Address; REAL AMERICA'S VOICE
